action.reasoning: Observation: DQN score 0.0 (all failures), far below heuristic baseline 0.1428. Training failed to produce meaningful policy. Analysis: The heuristic stops prematurely when no neighbor has utility>0 but frontiers remain elsewhere. Need a planner that can plan paths to distant frontiers. Decision: Implement a frontier-based exploration policy using the environment's graph for pathfinding. This should dramatically increase success rate and exploration_score. Submit eval to measure progress against baseline.
